WebResource.Name: ts_/html/WorkOrderExportIncludedWorkOrders.html
WebResource.Description: Display Work Orders included in the current Work Order Export Job payload
WebResource.DependencyXml: <Dependencies><Dependency componentType="WebResource"><Library name="ts_/resx/WorkOrderExport.1033.resx" displayName="ts_/resx/WorkOrderExport.1033.resx" languagecode="1033" description="ROM TSIS 2.0 Work Order PDF Export English Resource Strings" libraryUniqueId="{7325622c-e1e3-4904-19ec-4ae977da437c}"/><Library name="ts_/resx/WorkOrderExport.1036.resx" displayName="ts_/resx/WorkOrderExport.1036.resx" languagecode="1036" description="ROM TSIS 2.0 Work Order PDF Export French Resource Strings" libraryUniqueId="{3b428878-3e4d-733c-170b-a4e52e047692}"/></Dependency></Dependencies>
